reviews.review_msg: Professor Howlett is nice and is clearly knowledgable on public policy design. However, taking 854 was one the biggest regrets of my university experience. The professor never gave out any kind of rubrics for assignments, and you had to beg through emails to get any kind of information + Information was vague and changed randomly during the term.

This class gave me mental health problems.....

Howlett is clearly a brilliant writer but should never be allowed to teach. He doesn't believe in rubrics, or really any clear written criteria. You have to find out vital information for the course through either begging him on Gmail or through a classmate. AVOID if you care about your mental health
